name: Apollo.io
description: Monitor Apollo.io sales intelligence platform for API access and contact data compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Apollo.io at https://app.apollo.io
2. Go to Settings → Integrations → API
3. Copy your API key
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Apollo.io Settings → Integrations → API Keys

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies Apollo.io API credentials are active for sales intelligence access

checks.name: Data Masking
checks.description: Verifies Apollo.io contact data access is controlled via scoped API keys
